original: A towering, serpentine predator from the waist down, the naleen is supporting a chiseled humanoid torso that bears more than a passing resemblance to a feline, with jet black fur and perky feline ears. His messy hair hangs loose down his shoulders, held by a headband of woven leaves. He scowls menacingly, baring his razor sharp claws at you as he studies you, his coils primed for a pounce the moment he catches an opening.
The naleen slides out of the way of your attack, serpentine body coiling upon itself with serpentine speed.
The naleen deflects your strikes with quick strikes of his own, effectively parrying your attack.
You quickly get out of his way as he impacts the ground where you were mere moments ago. You step back, narrowly avoiding his sweeping snake half as he uses his momentum in an attempt to trip you.

You yelp as you are brought crashing down onto the ground. Luckily your shield seems to have taken the brunt of his blow. You push him off, watching as he flops on the ground with a pained yowl. He quickly gets back on his coils, though it seems like he didn’t get out of this unscathed.
There is a concussive boom and tingling aftershock of energy as your shield is breached.

You yelp as you are brought crashing down onto the ground. Without shields to protect you, you are left to struggle against his slashing claws and bites. You eventually manage to push him off you, but not before taking significant damage.
bites, punching through a thin spot in your [pc.upperGarment]
bites the exposed skin near your shoulder

. You yell as you feel his venom pumping into your bloodstream. Ceasing your struggle momentarily, your thoughts become hazy and your movements sluggish; suddenly the idea of surrendering to this powerful male’s coils doesn’t sound like such a bad idea....
There is a concussive boom and tingling aftershock of energy as your shield is breached.
Your breath is taken away by a brutal squeezes, and in a moment you’re seeing stars!
